_comment: Per-(case_id, GPU device name) golden. KEY IS THE GPU DEVICE NAME (torch.cuda.get_device_name == CSV gpu_name == DB `gpu`), NOT sm_arch — one arch spans multiple GPUs (sm90=H100/H200/H20, sm120=RTX-PRO-6000/5090) with different perf. Empty case map => bootstrap (test skips, prints observed). DISCRETE golden = exact scalar (== assert). CONTINUOUS golden = {baseline_ms, cv, n, [k_sigma], [rel_floor]}; gate = baseline_ms*(1+max(k_sigma*cv, rel_floor)), defaults k_sigma=4 rel_floor=0.01. A legacy scalar continuous entry still works via the baseline*1.05 fallback. cv MUST come from a multi-run bootstrap; status:provisional entries are n=1 seeds with a wide rel_floor pending cluster re-bless. HISTORY: 2026-06-26 launch_count goldens RE-BLESSED under the per-case-subprocess + CUPTI-drain isolated harness — the old discrete launch_counts (49/59/71) were CUPTI-async-buffer contamination, not the real forward (true sm120 decode launch_count is 1); only sm120 re-measured isolated so far, attn_decode_dispatch sm90/sm100/sm103 DROPPED (bootstrap-skip) until re-blessed on cluster under the isolated harness; continuous baselines sm120 re-measured isolated (build2806), sm90/sm100/sm103 still pre-isolation same-session REPEAT=5 values (re-bless on cluster too); launch_count==1 is a weak tripwire (toy config fuses to 1 kernel) — add larger pinned cases. 2026-06-29 MIGRATED arch->device-name keys; seeded H100/B200 long-seq (q8b/l70b ctx_fmha+decode_xqa) from nightly n=1.

NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edi._src: ISOLATED harness (per-case subprocess + CUPTI drain) build2806 REPEAT=5: 2.986/2.9862/2.9864/2.9851/2.9851; cv 0.019% -> 1% floor binds. NOTE 2.99 vs old seed 2.79 is a cross-day env diff (proven NOT rc18->rc19, NOT contamination); verify clock-lock actually engages before trusting as a tight baseline.

NVIDIA B300._src: samesession build2801 REPEAT=5 B300-pcie: 1.0373/1.0363/1.0405/1.0384/1.0415; cv 0.19% -> 1% floor binds

NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edi._src: ISOLATED REPEAT=5 build2814(539ee22) 2026-07-01: 0.0860/0.0840/0.0840/0.0840/0.0840; run-1 cold-container spike +2.4%, cv 0.97% -> 4sigma gate 3.9% absorbs it. Nightly=REPEAT1 fresh container measures the COLD value, so gate must cover run-1. Supersedes 0.084/cv0.11% (false-flagged nightly).

NVIDIA B300._src: samesession build2801 REPEAT=5 B300-pcie: 0.0599/0.0532/0.0532/0.0553/0.0522; cv 5.04% (first val warmup outlier; drop-first cv 2.11%) -> gate ~20%, NEARLY USELESS. INSENSITIVE case: 0.053ms kernel too short for stable CUDA-event timing on fast B300. TODO raise warmup/iters or treat as discrete-only (launch_count=71 still guards structure).

_comment_gqa: Model-representative GQA cases (isolated harness, build2806). sm120 only so far; other arches bootstrap-skip until re-blessed on cluster. q8b=Qwen3-8B 32/8/128; l70b=64/8/128 (Qwen3-32B/Llama-3.3-70B/Nemotron-Super-49B). Continuous baselines are n=2 smoke values (1% floor binds since cv<0.1%); refine with a K=5 bootstrap.

NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edi._src: ISOLATED REPEAT=5 build2814(539ee22) 2026-07-01: 0.2839/0.2686/0.2662/0.2673/0.2673; run-1 cold +6.2%, cv 2.47% -> 4sigma gate ~9.9%. Supersedes n=2 build2806 0.255 (undersampled, persistently false-flagged nightly REGRESSION).
